form.formComment: Won two starts back over 390m at this track. Last start he finished 6th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (16.94) behind I'm The Problem in a Grade 5 on March 30. Draw likely to suit. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.
